tasks.title: Feature: statuses (4 endpoints: DELETE, GET, POST)
tasks.description:
Generate the COMPLETE NestJS module for 'statuses' with ALL layers:
- Controller (all 4 endpoints)
- Service (business logic)
- DTOs (request/response types)
- Guards (JWT auth where needed)
- Validators (input validation)
- Module registration

Endpoints:
  POST /api/v1/statuses — Create a 24-hour status update
  POST /api/v1/statuses/{statusId}/replies — Create a reply to a status
  GET /api/v1/statuses/{statusId}/replies — List replies to a status
  DELETE /api/v1/statuses/{statusId}/replies/{replyId} — Delete a reply to a status

tasks.title: Feature: media (7 endpoints: GET, POST, PUT)
tasks.description:
Generate the COMPLETE NestJS module for 'media' with ALL layers:
- Controller (all 7 endpoints)
- Service (business logic)
- DTOs (request/response types)
- Guards (JWT auth where needed)
- Validators (input validation)
- Module registration

Endpoints:
  POST /api/v1/media/images — Upload an image
  POST /api/v1/media/videos — Upload video media
  GET /api/v1/media/library — List user gallery items
  POST /api/v1/media/uploads — Upload media from device gallery
  PUT /api/v1/media/uploads/{uploadId}/parts/{partNumber} — Upload a media chunk
  POST /api/v1/media/uploads/{uploadId}/complete — Complete an HD media upload
  GET /api/v1/media/{mediaId} — Retrieve encrypted media metadata and download URL
